name: Burgers Divan
recipeIngredient: 4 hamburger buns or kiaser rolls, split and toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a skillet until crisp. Drain, reserving drippings.
2. Crumble the bacon.
3. Cook onion in reserved drippings until tender.
4. Combine crumbled bacon, cooked onion, worcestershire sauce, salt, mustard, and oregano in a bowl.
5. Add ground beef to the mixture; mix well.
6. Shape the mixture into four 1/2 inch thick patties.
7. Broil the patties about 3 inches from heat until desired doneness is reached (about 10 minutes total time for medium).
8. In a small bowl, combine mayonnaise or salad dressing and milk.
9. Place one tomato slice and a few zucchini slices on each burger patty.
10. Dollop the mayonnaise mixture onto each burger.
11. Sprinkle with grated parmesan cheese.
12. Broil about 1 minute longer to heat through.
13. Serve on buns or rolls.
Makes 4 servings.
